# New semantic (single-name-namespace): -regex R alone matches any
# top-level decl by name — plain funcs, methods, vars, consts, types.
# Prior behaviour matched only free funcs, forcing agents to re-issue
# with -receiver to pick up methods. This fixture guards the new,
# single-invocation workflow against regression.
exec sflit -source big.go -sink small.go -regex '^Filter' -move
cmp small.go expected_small.go
cmp big.go expected_big.go

-- big.go --
package p

type R struct{}

func FilterFunc() {}
func (r R) FilterMethod() {}

var FilterVar = 1
const FilterConst = 2

type FilterType struct{ X int }

func Other() {}
-- expected_big.go --
package p

type R struct{}

func Other() {}
-- expected_small.go --
package p

func FilterFunc()         {}
func (r R) FilterMethod() {}

var FilterVar = 1

const FilterConst = 2

type FilterType struct{ X int }
